_reconciliation_note: overall_ranks.csv contains 42 methods; manuscript evaluates 40. The 2 extra rows are cell-level variants that the manuscript counts as single methods: ['DECIPHER (cell)', 'FuseMap (cell)']. Arithmetic: 42 CSV rows - 2 (cell variants double-counted) = 40 (matches manuscript's 40). Both rows are kept in method_scores but flagged here. Nicheformer IS one of the manuscript's 40 named methods — it is not extra.
